class.help: Codificadora de estados de la carpeta
class.label: Estado Carpeta
class.name: ESTADO

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_estado as oi_estado, t0.c_estado as c_estado, t0.d_estado as d_estado, SEC.policy, t0.c_estado as CODE, t0.d_estado as TEXT FROM LEG31_ESTADOS as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Estados.ESTADO\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_estado LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_estado asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_estado as oi_estado, SEC.policy FROM LEG31_ESTADOS as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Estados.ESTADO\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_estado LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_estado asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Estados.ESTADO.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Estados.ESTADO.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(LEG31_ESTADOS.oi_estado) as CNT from LEG31_ESTADOS Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and LEG31_ESTADOS.oi_estado={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(LEG31_ESTADOS.d_estado,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(LEG31_ESTADOS.c_estado,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

method.label: Guarda el cambio de estado de la carpeta
method.name: SAVE_ESTADO_CARPETA

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Estados.ESTADO.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Estados.ESTADO.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(LEG31_ESTADOS.oi_estado) as CNT from LEG31_ESTADOS Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and LEG31_ESTADOS.oi_estado={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(LEG31_ESTADOS.d_estado,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(LEG31_ESTADOS.c_estado,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

resource.description: Sin mostrar Cierre ni Reapertura, ni Baja
resource.name: INFO2

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Estados.ESTADO.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Estados.ESTADO.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(LEG31_ESTADOS.oi_estado) as CNT from LEG31_ESTADOS Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and LEG31_ESTADOS.oi_estado={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(LEG31_ESTADOS.d_estado,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(LEG31_ESTADOS.c_estado,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

resource.description: Sin mostrar Cierre ni Reapertura, tiene Baja para el filter
resource.name: INFO_CON_BAJA

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Estados.ESTADO.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Estados.ESTADO.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(LEG31_ESTADOS.oi_estado) as CNT from LEG31_ESTADOS Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and LEG31_ESTADOS.oi_estado={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(LEG31_ESTADOS.d_estado,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(LEG31_ESTADOS.c_estado,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW
